title: LayoutFamily
description: A concrete-but-still-engine-neutral spatial resolution strategy for one BuildingArchetype: how to turn its GameplayGraph zones into an actual rect-based layout. Carries rotation/reflection permissions and weighted variant choices for deterministic seeded variation. Like BuildingArchetype, a LayoutFamily MUST NOT reference raw engine tile IDs.

tier.description: Which of the archetype's authored layout tiers this is, e.g. compact, offset_l, zoned_expanded. Freeform, not every archetype authors all three -- see WO-0059's own required-conditions caveat. Added for WO-0059.

size_range.description: This layout family's own footprint range, which must sit within its archetype's size_constraints. Added for WO-0059.

placement_rule.description: Freeform placement directive, e.g. centered_on_primary_axis, offset_to_subzone_axis, adjacent_to:common_room.

variants.description: Weighted-choice pool. A seeded compiler picks one variant deterministically from these weights using the GenerationManifest seed.
